case_title: MICHAEL CRUZ VS. EXPRESS PARKING INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HALIL YACMAZ--LOCATION MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $601.00 FILED BY CRUZ, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-11-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
